title: A Musician Says Goodbye to His TV Show
summary: Labrinth is a musician who makes music for a TV show called Euphoria. He has decided to leave the show and the music industry. He shared this news on Instagram, saying he is done with it. Labrinth wrote songs and music for the first two seasons of Euphoria, which is a popular show about teenagers. Last year, the show added another famous composer, Hans Zimmer, to help with the music for the new season. Labrinth had said he was happy about this before. But now, he is criticizing the show and the company that releases the music. It is not clear why he is leaving or if his music will still be in the new season. Euphoria started in 2019 and has helped many young actors become famous. The new season will start in April, and the characters will be older.

a social media app where people share posts
a part of a TV show with new episodes

options: They will be in high school
They will move to a new town

background_read: Labrinth is a British musician known for his work on the TV show Euphoria, which is about teenagers dealing with life issues. He wrote music for the show and won an award for it. The show has made many young actors famous. In 2025, Hans Zimmer joined to help with the music for the new season, and Labrinth was excited at first. But now, Labrinth has decided to leave the show and the music industry, though the reasons are not clear.
Article_Structure: WHO: Labrinth, a musician who composes music for Euphoria
WHAT: He announced he is leaving the show and the music industry
WHERE: He shared this on Instagram, and the show is produced by HBO
WHY: He is criticizing the show and Columbia Records, but the exact reason is unknown

perspectives.description: He feels done with the industry and is unhappy with the show and music company.
